subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, wherein mention is made of that which hath been vouchsafed unto him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و یذکر فیه ما فاز به انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @law of pilgrimage, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
